coverage_goal: Collect eventing results for every FEI member nation, prioritizing data.fei and supplementing with national-event sources for every available national level.

sources.name: FEI Database
sources.notes: Primary eventing source. Use before national sources whenever a result appears in the FEI database.

sources.name: European national federation results
sources.notes: Discover and connect national federation calendars and result portals for every European FEI member nation and every available national-event level.

sources.name: British Eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for UK coverage across every available national-event level.

sources.name: Equestrian Australia eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for Australian coverage across every available national-event level.

sources.name: Equestrian Sports New Zealand eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for New Zealand coverage across every available national-event level.

sources.name: United States Eventing Association results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for USA coverage across every available national-event level.

sources.name: All national federation results
sources.notes: Backfill national events for every FEI member nation and every available national-event level after higher-priority sources are covered.
